summary: Iteration 30 — Tested Everest Systems NDL warranty extension. Backend: 6/6 pytest pass (Everest 4 starter systems, 36 mirrored products, warranty_*_ndl + warranty_*_add persistence on TEST_ deal). Frontend visually verified Materials column rename to 'Handling %' (header now reads 'HANDLING %' in caps via CSS uppercase). Calculator vendor selector is a <select> dropdown containing 'Everest Systems'. Could not complete end-to-end NDL toggle automation (Playwright text locator returned the hidden <option> elements; need to use page.select_option for the <select>).

issues: Subtitle still says 'Pick up to 3 systems, enter total square footage...' — but code allows 4 compare columns and iteration 29 verified the 4-system / 5th-blocked toast. Minor copy mismatch; not blocking.

verified_flows.GET /api/systems 4 Everest: PASS — 5/10/15/20-yr Silkoxy Silicone systems present alongside Western Colloid + Gaco
verified_flows.GET /api/products Everest count: PASS — exactly 36 Everest Systems products mirrored
verified_flows.Deal warranty_20yr_ndl + warranty_20yr_a: PASS — PUT then GET on TEST_Lead Deal persists ndl=true and add=3500
verified_flows.All 4 NDL booleans (10/15/20/25): PASS — all four fields round-trip cleanly
verified_flows.Existing vendors preserved: PASS — Western Colloid + Gaco systems still listed
verified_flows.Materials.jsx 'Handling %' rename: VISUALLY CONFIRMED in screenshot — column header reads 'HANDLING %' (uppercase via CSS); Everest Systems vendor group shows 36 products with the renamed column header. data-testid edit-mat-markup field name unchanged (per code review).
verified_flows.Calculator /calculator loads with Everes: VISUALLY CONFIRMED — vendor <select> has option value='Everest Systems' (rendered when expanded)
verified_flows.NDL toggle UI flow (pick 20-yr → see Sta: NOT AUTOMATED — Playwright did not switch the manufacturer <select> to Everest in time; would require page.select_option('select','Everest Systems'). Backend math + persistence verified. Main agent should self-test the UI toggle manually or after the dropdown selector fix below.

critical_code_review_comments: Calculator.jsx subtitle on line ~717 (approx) still reads 'Pick up to 3 systems' but the compare grid supports 4 columns (verified iter 29). Update copy to 'Pick up to 4 systems'.
seed_everest.py is correctly idempotent: skips on (id) or (name,vendor) duplicates and on existing (vendor,warranty_years) systems. Safe to re-run.
warranty_*_ndl fields added to Deal Pydantic model (server.py:510-513) default False — correct.
Note: 'Pick up to 3 systems' subtitle in calculator.jsx is a leftover from when only 3 columns existed; should be 4 to match the compare-col-0..3 grid and the iteration-29 verified 5th-block toast.
action_items: (Optional) Update Calculator subtitle from 'Pick up to 3 systems' → 'Pick up to 4 systems' to match actual 4-column compare grid.

(Optional, main-agent self-test) Manually open /calculator, switch Manufacturer <select> to 'Everest Systems', enter Total SF=5000, pick the 20-Year Silkoxy system, confirm breakdown row '+ Warranty (Standard, 20-yr) $1,000.00', tick [data-testid=ndl-toggle-0] and verify it flips to '+ Warranty (NDL, 20-yr) $3,500.00' with Customer Price increasing by ~$2,500 × (1+OH)×(1+Profit). Then pick a 5-Year Silkoxy and confirm the amber warning text appears and set-option-* button is NOT rendered for that column.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_everest_warranty.py (new — 6 pytest cases for Everest NDL warranty)

success_rate.frontend: Materials rename + Calc vendor option visually confirmed; full NDL toggle flow not automated

seed_data_creation: Set + reverted warranty_*_ndl/warranty_*_add on TEST_Lead Deal (id starting 640a9104). Final state: all reverted to false/0 per agent-to-agent contract.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 100% solid for the Everest NDL extension. Materials 'Handling %' rename is visually confirmed via screenshot (rendered uppercase as 'HANDLING %'). For frontend NDL toggle automation: the Calculator Manufacturer selector is a real <select>, not a custom dropdown — use `await page.select_option('select', label='Everest Systems')` then wait ~1s for the sidebar to repopulate with the 4 Silkoxy systems (data-testid='pick-system-<id>'). Test deal TEST_Lead Deal (640a9104-0bd5-44dd-9f13-51e4b8cd2e4e) is clean and ready.
